one_liner: SE Ranking offers a unified REST API (Data API + Project API) authenticated via a single API key, with self-serve trial/paid access and a community-built MCP server available.

auth_methods.notes: Single API key used for both Data API and Project API, passed via 'Authorization: Token YOUR_API_KEY' header or as 'apikey' query parameter.

self_serve_notes: No permanent free tier, but a 14-day trial with 100,000 API credits is available. Paid options include pay-as-you-go credit packs (from $50/250k credits), a subscription add-on with monthly credits, or a standalone API plan (~$155-179/month). API key is generated directly from the account API Dashboard without needing to contact sales.

api_surface.notes: Covers keyword research, competitor analysis, backlinks, website audits, AI Search, and project/rank-tracking management via unified endpoints at api.seranking.com. OpenAPI spec published on GitHub (seranking/openapi).

evidence.supports: Single API key auth via Authorization header, rate limits, error codes, request format.
Self-serve API key generation, 14-day trial with 100,000 credits, unified key for Data and Project APIs, pricing tiers.
Pricing details: pay-as-you-go, subscription add-on, standalone plan.
Published OpenAPI specification indicating broad REST API surface.
Data API reference documentation covering multiple endpoint categories.

flags: MCP server appears to be a third-party/community middleware implementation rather than an official first-party SE Ranking product; verify maintenance status and source.
No permanent free tier; ongoing use requires a paid plan or credit purchase after the trial.
